hero.title:
Just type the job name.
Your invoice is done.
hero.subtitle: AI-powered invoice tool built for construction & painting businesses. Auto-generate line items from project names. Fully compliant with Japan's Invoice System.

items.problem: Typing the same line items over and over
items.solution: Just type "exterior painting" and get paint, scaffolding, masking, and washing items auto-generated.
Registration numbers and tax categories are applied automatically. Create compliant invoices every time.

items.problem: Managing invoices in Excel is painful
items.solution: Dashboard with full invoice management. Track status and analyze revenue in one click.

ai.title: Industry-Specific AI Assistant
ai.description: Type "exterior painting" or "roof repair" and get paint names, scaffolding, masking, and pressure washing items auto-generated. Built on 1,600+ industry cases.

templates.title: Construction Invoice Templates
templates.description: Templates optimized for construction estimates and invoices. Fully compliant with Japan's Invoice System requirements.

pdf.title: One-Click PDF Export
pdf.description: Download invoices as print-ready PDFs instantly. View and share from your phone on the job site.

manage.title: Job & Client Management
manage.description: Organize invoices by project and client. Track outstanding amounts to prevent missed collections.

steps.title: AI generates line items
steps.description: Paint, scaffolding, masking, and washing items are filled in automatically.

steps.title: Export & send PDF
steps.description: Review and download PDF. Send by email in one click.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Try all features free for 14 days.

items.question: Will I be charged during the free trial?
items.answer: No. The 14-day trial is completely free. Cancel anytime during the trial period at no cost.

items.question: Is it compliant with Japan's Invoice System?
items.answer: Yes. Qualified invoice issuer registration numbers are built in. Tax rate classification is also supported.

items.question: Can I use it outside construction?
items.answer: Yes. AI auto-generation is optimized for construction & painting, but manual entry works for any industry.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit via SSL.

cta.title: How many hours do you spend on invoices each month?
cta.subtitle: With Smart Invoice, just type the job name. Try free for 14 days.
